completed_slice: Added a fail-closed verifier for exact-commit Cloudflare environment-preflight workflow artifacts.
blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN before deployment and hostname proof can complete.
next_action: Obtain an exact-commit preflight workflow artifact, verify it with the new module, then dispatch the production deployment workflow only after the bounded verdict passes.
